subcodes.first_line: God, the All-Glorious, is cognizant, and the kingdoms of earth and heaven bear witness, that this Wronged One hath arisen for the sake of God and to summon the peoples of the earth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حق جل جلاله آگاه و ملک و ملکوت گواه که اینمظلوم لله قیام نمود و عباد ارض را
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prayer for spiritual recognition
